## Foundation review

- [ ] Preserves human agency
- [ ] Distinguishes fact, observation, hypothesis, and judgment
- [ ] Allows correction, rejection, and revocation
- [ ] Does not create permanent labels from temporary states
- [ ] Includes consent and audit implications
- [ ] Documents uncertainty and evidence
- [ ] Remains useful across AI model changes

Describe affected standards, schemas, APIs, or projects.
